phrases.intent_en: Buy two tickets for the wine museum
phrases.text_local: Je voudrais deux billets pour la Cité du Vin, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh voo-DRAY duh bee-YAY poor lah see-TAY doo VAN seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Admission includes an audio guide in your language and a wine tasting at the Belvédère on the 8th floor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which wine regions are covered in the permanent exhibition
phrases.text_local: Quelles régions viticoles sont couvertes dans l'exposition permanente ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel ray-ZHYON vee-tee-KOL son koo-VERT dahn lex-poh-ZEE-SYON pair-mah-NAHNT
phrases.cultural_note: The museum covers wine cultures from around the world, not just Bordeaux.

responses.english: It's indicated in the tour route.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a recommendation for a Bordeaux wine to buy
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous me recommander un vin de Bordeaux à emporter ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY-voo muh ruh-koh-mahn-DAY un VAN duh bor-DOH ah ahm-por-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Cité du Vin's shop stocks wines from all of Bordeaux's appellations, including lesser-known ones.

responses.english: Try the Médoc or the Saint-Émilion.
responses.phonetic: goo-TAY luh may-DOK oo luh sant-ay-mee-LYOHN
responses.local: Goûtez le Médoc ou le Saint-Émilion.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the belvedere tasting terrace is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le Belvédère pour la dégustation, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh bel-vay-DAIR poor lah day-goos-TAH-SYON seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Belvédère on the 8th floor offers a panoramic view of Bordeaux and a complimentary tasting of one wine.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if audio guides are available in English
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a des audioguides disponibles en anglais ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-keel-YAH day oh-dyoh-GHEED dees-poh-NEEBL ahn ahn-GLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are available in many languages; ask at the ticket desk if unsure.
